Discreet Packaging

Usage Instructions

✅Tear the Durex Together Condom wrapper open from the serrated edge. Be careful not to damage the condom with fingernails or sharp objects.

✅With the roll outside, squeeze the teat and place the condom on the tip of the erect penis.

✅Roll down to the base. Stop and check if you feel the condom slipping off or too tight on the penis because this might lead to breakage. You should take the condom off soon after ejaculation. Hold firmly at the base of the penis before pulling out.

✅Dispose of the foil and used condom into a bin. Do not flush the foil or condom down the toilet.

Frequently Asked Questions

Do condoms expire?

Yes, Durex condoms typically have a 5-year shelf life. You can find the expiration date on the box or on the back of each foil.

Do condoms break easily?

All Durex condoms are 100% electronically tested and pass all safety tests.

Can I use lubes with condoms?

Yes! All Durex lubricants are compatible with Durex condoms.

Can condoms cause allergy?

Most Durex varieties are made of natural latex rubber. If latex allergies are a concern, try our non-latex condoms including Durex Real Feel and Durex Latex Free.

Can I use condoms under water?

Yes, but be sure to put the condom on before getting into the water. Bath oils, soaps or other substances in the water may have an adverse effect on the latex condom material.

Why should I use condoms?

Condoms are an effective way to prevent pregnancy and STIs when used as directed. However, no form of contraception is 100% effective.

How is my product delivered?

All Durex products are delivered in discreet packaging with no mention of Durex or condoms/lubes.
